{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201805586B8532F81289AE739090"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617114739803734808","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很甜，作者写的每个副本都很有意义"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773500645,"group_id":"7612889582807288894","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"不做作者，只做读者","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N77RgOSwDU7d8It+KfSBaCbJKwihJk43McOTi1s6P99c","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3e98bf3ba0f04b81acf1deb9de0839b8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529365&x-signature=3hT7iyo6m%2Bmk4DrjzzetwRquWjw%3D","user_id":"3333338600844343","user_name":"“朝俞呀”"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3333338600844343","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1773845680,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612889582807288894","book_info":{"abstract":"【双强＋1v1＋HE＋甜宠＋爽文＋神经心狠受vs淡漠宠溺攻】
黎初棠死了，黎初棠活了。
他成为无限流世界的副本流窜者，玩家的任务是逃出生天，而他的任务是路见不平一声吼。
于是，他在副本里到处蹦跶，谁让自己不爽当场报复回去，喜提一个只会以他为中心的绝世好老攻后真香了。
小黎：论在副本里杀了老攻怎么办？
路见微，从世界诞生起就存在的主神，活得太久，太无聊，主系统发现他有淡淡的死感，连忙调出一个画面：“看到了吗？这是什么？这是打不死的小强！”
“再看看你！天天想死，和他成为一对，勇享美丽人生。”
路见微盯着画面中一次次在副本里死亡的人，点头道：“试试吧。”
注意：不是传统的无限流！
不虐！不虐！不虐！我文笔不够，感情线比剧情线多喔，依旧是小甜饼。
作者是个笨比写得没有很激情四射，请大家见谅，当个睡前小甜饼看就好啦，整体偏轻松。
有雷点的宝宝们别喷我！！文中有副cp，但是！只有一对！戏份只有一个副本！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/5f6717964db06e0a43fb5445ca6d5c9b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"羊羊羊羊羊羔","author_id":"","book_id":"7612889582807288894","book_name":"无限流：杀穿副本后真香了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":478,"name":"强强","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=478&name=强强&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":265,"name":"先婚后爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=265&name=先婚后爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":
